---
title: "OBIS Training Slide Decks"
subtitle: "Slide decks used in training delivered by the OBIS community"
format:
  html:
    theme: [obis_theme.scss]
    css: [custom.css]
---

## 2026

- [July INVEMAR DNA data management](index-invemar.qmd)
- [July OBIS Node Training on DNA data](https://iobis.github.io/obis_edna_slides_node_training/)

## Other slide decks

- [Publishing eDNA Data in OBIS (full deck)](index-edna-full.qmd)
